summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustFhone Delhi marketplace. All major features working correctly. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All UI flows working. Watermark successfully hidden. Image upload with local storage fallback working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400 when required fields are missing

passed_tests: Health API: GET /api/health returns OK with TrustFhone message
Page title: 'TrustFhone Delhi | AI-Verified Mobile Marketplace' (correct)
Watermark #emergent-badge is NOT visible (CSS rule working)
No 'Made with Emergent' text found on any page
Admin login with admin@trustfhone.com / admin123 works
Seller registration with role selection works
Image upload POST /api/cloudinary/upload returns HTTPS URL (not localhost)
Uploaded images are accessible via returned URL (HTTP 200)
Filtered listings with query params works
My listings GET /api/listings/my/listings works for authenticated users
Seller dashboard loads with stats cards
Create Listing form opens with all required fields
Role-based redirects work (admin -> admin-dashboard, seller -> seller-dashboard)
action_items: MINOR: Fix POST /api/listings to return 400 instead of 500 for missing required fields

test_credentials.test_sellers_created: Multiple test_seller_* accounts created during testing

seed_data_creation: Test sellers and buyers created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Image upload uses local storage fallback (Cloudinary not configured). Fraud detection OCR is working with emergentintegrations Python library. The only minor issue is error handling for missing fields in listing creation returns 500 instead of 400.
